Term & Condition

Effective Date: 1/29/26

These Terms & Conditions (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of the ATMP-Core and ATMP-Courier platforms operated by Saber Tech. By accessing or using the Platform, you agree to be legally bound by these Terms.

 

1. Platform Purpose

ATMP-Courier is an operational logistics and last-mile delivery platform designed to manage dispatch execution, driver availability enforcement, payment validation, and delivery accountability. The Platform is intended for lawful commercial use only.

 

2. User Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years old to use the Platform. Drivers must meet all licensing, vehicle, insurance, and verification requirements as defined by Saber Tech and applicable laws.

 

3. Account Registration & Responsibility

Users are responsible for maintaining accurate account information and safeguarding login credentials. Any activity conducted through your account is your responsibility. Saber Tech is not liable for unauthorized access caused by user negligence.

 

4. Driver Obligations

Drivers using the Platform agree to comply with all dispatch rules, availability enforcement mechanisms, acceptance windows, and delivery execution requirements. Failure to comply may result in restricted access, suspension, or permanent removal from the Platform.

 

5. Payments & Revenue Protection

The Platform enforces payment validation, acceptance logic, and revenue protection controls. Saber Tech reserves the right to delay, withhold, or reverse payments in cases of suspected fraud, policy violations, failed deliveries, or disputes.

 

6. Prohibited Activities

Users may not misuse the Platform, attempt to bypass enforcement systems, manipulate availability status, falsify delivery records, interfere with system integrity, or engage in unlawful activities. Violations may result in immediate termination.

 

7. Intellectual Property

All Platform content, software, systems, trademarks, and proprietary technology are owned by Saber Tech. Unauthorized copying, modification, or distribution is strictly prohibited.

 

8. Service Availability

While we strive for continuous availability, Saber Tech does not guarantee uninterrupted access. The Platform may be temporarily unavailable due to maintenance, updates, or technical issues.

 

9. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Saber Tech shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, including lost profits, data loss, or service interruptions arising from Platform use.

 

10. Termination

Saber Tech reserves the right to suspend or terminate access at any time for violations of these Terms, operational risk, or legal compliance reasons.

 

11. Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the applicable operating jurisdiction, without regard to conflict of law principles.

 

12. Acceptance

By using the Platform, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms & Conditions.

content.rendered:
Privacy Policy

Effective Date: 1/29/26

Saber Tech (“Saber Tech,” “we,” “our,” or “us”) operates the ATMP-Core and ATMP-Courier platforms, including all related websites, applications, and services (collectively, the “Platform”). We are committed to protecting the privacy, confidentiality, and security of all users who interact with our Platform.

This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, share, and protect your personal information when you access or use our services as a customer, driver, business partner, or visitor.

 

1. Information We Collect

We collect information necessary to operate a secure, efficient, and enforcement-driven logistics platform.

Personal Information

When you register or use the Platform, we may collect personal information such as your name, email address, phone number, mailing address, login credentials, and profile details. For drivers, we may also collect government-issued identification, driver’s license details, vehicle information, insurance documents, and verification records.

Financial Information

To process payments and protect revenue integrity, we may collect billing details, payment method information, transaction history, and payout records. Payment data is processed securely through authorized third-party payment providers.

Operational & Usage Information

We automatically collect technical and operational data, including IP address, browser type, device information, timestamps, acceptance windows, availability status, dispatch activity, and delivery performance metrics.

Location Information

Location data may be collected in real time to enable dispatch coordination, route optimization, availability enforcement, and delivery confirmation.

 

2. How We Use Your Information

We use collected information to operate and improve the Platform, including but not limited to managing dispatch workflows, validating driver availability, enforcing acceptance windows, processing payments, preventing fraud, and maintaining system accountability.

Your information helps us ensure operational accuracy, system reliability, regulatory compliance, and secure execution of deliveries from order creation through completion.

 

3. Data Sharing and Disclosure

Saber Tech does not sell or rent personal data.

We may share information with trusted third parties such as payment processors, identity verification providers, cloud infrastructure partners, and analytics services solely for operational purposes. We may also disclose information when required by law, regulation, court order, or to protect the rights, safety, or security of the Platform and its users.

 

4. Data Retention

We retain personal and operational data only for as long as necessary to fulfill business, legal, and regulatory requirements. Upon account termination, data may be retained for compliance, dispute resolution, fraud prevention, or audit purposes and may later be anonymized for analytical use.

 

5. Data Security

We implement industry-standard technical and organizational safeguards, including encryption, access controls, authentication systems, and continuous monitoring. While we strive to protect all data, users acknowledge that no system can be guaranteed 100% secure.

 

6. User Rights

Users may request access, correction, or deletion of personal information, subject to applicable laws and operational requirements. Requests can be submitted through official support channels and will be reviewed in accordance with legal obligations.

 

7. Policy Updates

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Continued use of the Platform after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

content.rendered:
Saber Tech Launches Cutting-Edge Platform to Transform Last-Mile Delivery

Saber Tech today announced the beta launch of its Last-Mile Courier Platform, a production-ready system the company operates to power real-world delivery execution and visibility. This milestone marks Saber Tech’s first fully deployable platform, now running live across the United States and Canada.

The beta focuses exclusively on last-mile courier operations, delivering reliable dispatch coordination, real-time tracking, exception handling, and operational visibility across local and regional networks. It is purpose-built to ensure on-time, transparent, and professional delivery execution, without attempting to serve as a full supply chain or transportation management system.

By directly operating the platform, Saber Tech maintains complete control over performance, reliability, and day-to-day operations, allowing the team to refine and optimize the system in real-world conditions.

While the company envisions a broader logistics ecosystem, this beta prioritizes stability and consistent last-mile performance, laying the foundation for scalable, dependable delivery solutions.

With this beta launch, Saber Tech solidifies its reputation as an operator-first technology company, deploying systems only when they are proven ready for real-world operations. Each release is deliberately scoped to ensure fully deployable, production-ready performance, with additional platform functionality introduced only when it meets the same rigorous operational standards.

Media Contact

Val Olson
Chief Public Relations Officer
Saber Tech
Email: volson@sabertechlogistics.com

Why ATMP Uses Progressive Web Apps

ATMP leverages Progressive Web Apps (PWAs) to ensure consistent business logic across all devices. Updates deploy instantly, no app store delays, so owners and operators maintain full control over live operations.

PWAs deliver real-time push notifications, offline resilience, and secure access while reducing maintenance overhead. This approach minimizes downtime and operational friction, supporting efficiency and profitability for every delivery.

content.rendered:
ATMP-core

ATMP-Core: Discipline Before Dispatch

ATMP-core acts as a control gate for every delivery. Jobs only go live when drivers are available, vehicles are suitable, and terms are confirmed. By enforcing readiness before movement, the system prevents breakdowns, delays, and wasted effort, creating delivery operations built on discipline, not chance.

Control Before Motion

Every delivery decision should be made before the wheels move.

Design Goal

Protect revenue by enforcing rules before execution.

ATMP-core is where order replaces chaos. It sets execution rules in advance, confirming readiness, aligning capacity, and locking in accountability before a job is released. Nothing is assumed. Nothing is improvised.

By making design decisions upstream, ATMP-core eliminates costly downstream corrections. Loads fit. Routes make sense. Operators stay in control.

Built as a flexible command layer, ATMP-core evolves as operations expand, without added friction, rebuilds, or hidden complexity. It’s not software that reacts. It’s the infrastructure that prevents.

Systems That Enforce Discipline

Expansion by Design

Built to grow cleanly across markets and workflows.

Funds First

Delivery only begins once payment is secured.

Always Verified

Dispatch runs on real-time readiness, not assumptions.

Right Fit, Every Time

Jobs align with vehicle capacity from the start.

Saber Tech empowers businesses with disciplined execution, seamless delivery, and operational precision.

At Saber Tech, we redefine last-mile delivery by combining smart technology with disciplined, operator-led execution. Every shipment is carefully coordinated, connecting drivers, routes, and packages seamlessly, so businesses can scale without operational headaches. Our transparent approach ensures every handoff, pickup, and drop-off is meticulously managed, providing complete visibility and control.

From multi-location retailers to fast-growing e-commerce brands, Saber Tech empowers companies to deliver efficiently, confidently, and consistently, turning complex logistics into a simple, reliable, and professional experience.

Every Package, Perfectly Managed

Our comprehensive services cover every stage of delivery, seamlessly connecting drivers, routes, and shipments. Businesses and individuals alike benefit from smart, reliable, and professionally managed solutions.

7. Transparent Operations

content.rendered:
ATMP Courier

Driver Guide

Welcome

Welcome to Your Seamless Delivery Experience

Step into a platform designed to make every route predictable, fair, and efficient. ATMP-Courier puts you in control, matching deliveries to the right vehicle, paying jobs upfront, and eliminating wasted time so you can focus on the road.

Our system listens to you. Every insight from real deliveries shapes smarter dispatching, optimized routes, and smoother workflows. When challenges arise, the platform adapts, keeping operations fast, transparent, and consistent.

This isn’t just technology; it’s a partner built for professionals who value clarity, precision, and the power to influence how every delivery gets done.

Overview

ATMP-Courier

ATMP-Courier: Last-Mile Execution Without Compromise

ATMP-Courier is a last-mile platform engineered to strengthen owner-operator profits through controlled delivery execution.
  • Built Driver-First
  • Payment Secured Before Dispatch
  • Earnings Protected by Enforcement
  • Predictable, Professional Execution
Driver Sign Up
Drivers start by completing the ATMP-Courier sign-up, providing key personal and location info to ensure smooth verification and a seamless start on the road.

Here’s What You’ll Need to Complete a Smooth Sign-Up:

  • Full legal name as shown on your government-issued driver’s license
  • Email address for confirmation and next steps
  • Mobile phone number capable of receiving text messages
  • City and state where you’ll be operating
  • Date of birth (drivers must be 18 years or older)

Providing these details unlocks the next steps: license, vehicle, and document verification, bringing you closer to active deliveries.

Begin Driver Sign Up
Verification & Documents
To ensure a safe and reliable delivery network, drivers complete verification by submitting documents confirming eligibility and vehicle readiness before accepting jobs.

What You’ll Need for Verification:

  • Valid driver’s license
  • Proof of vehicle insurance
  • Vehicle registration
  • Vehicle make, model, and year
  • Background screening via Checkr or equivalent

Note: No jobs will be dispatched until your verification is approved.

Dispatch Rules

What You Can Expect on the Job:

  • Mandatory job alerts to keep you in the loop
  • Acceptance time windows for each delivery
  • Automatic reassignment if alerts expire
  • Vehicle and load enforcement for safety and compliance
  • No unpaid or “ghost” jobs, every delivery is tracked and compensated
Driver App (PWA)

Driver App Features You’ll Love:

  • Runs in a browser (no heavy downloads required)
  • Installable to your home screen for quick access
  • No app store needed (start delivering immediately)
  • Push notifications to stay updated on new jobs
  • Automatic updates (always have the latest features)
Earnings & Protections

How Drivers Benefit:

  • Jobs paid before dispatch (get compensated promptly)
  • No platform cuts (you keep what you earn)
  • Reduced downtime through enforced availability
  • Clear job details upfront (know exactly what to expect before accepting)

Keep What You Earn

Our enforcement policies ensure profit retention, so drivers are compensated fairly and no earnings are lost to hidden fees or untracked jobs.
Support

Get Help When You Need It

Our support team is here for onboarding, verification, dispatch issues, or technical problems that might prevent you from completing a job. For the fastest resolution, keep your requests specific and include all relevant details.

  • Sign-Up & Verification Issues: Contact support if you are unable to sign up, verify documents, or access the driver PWA.
  • Job Issues: Contact support if a paid job isn’t visible, isn’t updating, or cannot be completed.
  • Safety First: Escalate any safety concerns immediately.

This is an example page. It’s different from a blog post because it will stay in one place and will show up in your site navigation (in most themes). Most people start with an About page that introduces them to potential site visitors. It might say something like this:

Hi there! I’m a bike messenger by day, aspiring actor by night, and this is my website. I live in Los Angeles, have a great dog named Jack, and I like piña coladas. (And gettin’ caught in the rain.)

…or something like this:

The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.

As a new WordPress user, you should go to your dashboard to delete this page and create new pages for your content. Have fun!
